reason: Expanded the durable-memory task contract to include update-memory and forget-memory safety flow.
Added durable memory update/forget store APIs with optimistic concurrency and tombstone semantics.
Added bridge handlers for update-memory and forget-memory with scoped diagnostics and conflict handling.
Exposed HTTP routes for update-memory and forget-memory.
Added CLI commands for update-memory and forget-memory.
Updated prompt guidance so agents know when to update or forget durable memory cards.
Added live-tool detection and expectations for update-memory and forget-memory.
Added regression coverage for durable memory mutation and tombstone visibility.
Added bridge regression coverage for update-memory and forget-memory.
Added CLI forwarding coverage for durable memory mutation commands.
Added prompt guidance regression coverage for update-memory and forget-memory.
Cleared stale memory mutation metadata when reviving tombstoned or expired cards via save-memory.
Added regression coverage that revived durable cards do not keep stale lastMutation metadata.
